rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation list used to illustrate prior applications of finite mixture logit models in marketing. The citing article does not engage the cited paper's parameter-bias findings, does not build hypotheses from it, and does not reuse a specific method or framework from it. The core contribution of the citing paper (comparing segment-retention criteria via simulation) is developed independently from other model-selection references, so this citation functions as background mention.
